next_cycle_focus: Wait for actual backtest/reflection output on the full INJ 2h batch, then compare branches by regime identity, trade density, PF/QScore, and walk-forward viability before choosing which acceptance/expansion concept deserves iteration.
rationale: Cycle 109 remains open. This reflection packet contained no fresh results or lessons, so there is no evidence to refine or abandon any of the three current-cycle INJ families.
